objects.name: NewText
objects.string:
"Shift" to dash
"Space" to jump
"s" to fall fast
"a, d" left right
"e" to interact with the portal

Debugging Controls (not the same across scenes btw)
"p" resets position
"r" lots of health
"z" zooms out
"L" spawns the boss
"I" spawns laser beams
"v" sets the boss to follow
"right click" sets the boss to follow the mouse
"3" boss circles the screen
"2" boss dashes at the player
"o" orbit the player
